error_signature: workflow just stops after the first batch
title: Split In Batches node not processing all items
symptom: The workflow processes the first batch correctly but stops without continuing to the next batches. Only the first 10 items are processed despite having more items.
applies_when: Workflow has multiple items to process
not_this_if: All items are processed in a single batch
The loop connection is correctly set up
root_cause: The Split In Batches node requires a loop connection back to itself to continue processing additional batches. Without this connection, n8n will only execute the first batch and terminate the workflow.
fix_steps: Connect the output of the last node (e.g., Database) back to the 'Continue' output of the Split In Batches node.
Ensure the workflow is saved and re-execute it.
agent_instruction: Create a loop connection from the last node back to the Split In Batches node's 'Continue' output.
